title.en: Ye Tian casually killed a Origin Middle Realm H...

content.en:
"Another one!"

Ye Tian casually killed a Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, the whole process was silent, and the other party did not suffer any pain.

With his current strength, killing these Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors was undoubtedly too much of a bully for them.

With the killing of a Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, the Shadow Alliance also panicked, looking for the enemy's attack, but there was no trace.

It was as if there was an incomparably powerful being slaughtering their Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

So, the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Alliance started a meeting to discuss this matter.

"Guys, there is an incomparably powerful existence that is slaughtering our Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, even the top Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor was killed silently, and there was no way to transmit a trace of information, I suspect that it was the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who did it!"

"Origin Upper Realm Overlord, we haven't offended a Origin Upper Realm Overlord!"

"It may be that a certain Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Alliance was inadvertently offended, and as a result, he provoked revenge, to the Origin Upper Realm Overlords, we are just ants! They will not consult with us, nor will they inform us, they will directly kill us. "

"There are not many Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the Shadow Ruins, those few should not attack us, they may be Origin Upper Realm Overlords from the Eternal Other!"

"So what now?"

"Reveal it first, we are willing to compensate and apologize, we just ask that Origin Upper Realm Overlord not to attack us, this is the only way!"

However.

Among this group of Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, there were three who looked at each other.

Because the dead were all the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the previous Shadow Ruins, all of them.

Maybe it's a coincidence, but these Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors are scattered in many treasure lands, and the probability of a coincidence is very low!

After this meeting, the Lord of the Shadow and the other three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors discussed it in private.

"The Lord of Xuanyin, the Lord of Taihe, the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm this time, may be to deal with our Shadow Ruins, our Shadow Ruins headquarters was destroyed before, looking back, the problem is very big, it is probably not the hand of the Dragon River, because the Dragon River has also suffered heavy losses. A lot of things don't fit the timeline, and the last time we used the Shadow Alliance to put pressure on the Dragon River, we also confirmed this. "The Lord of the Shadows.

"Yes!" the Lord of Taihe nodded, "Let's just say that the Lord of Ju Babies who destroyed our headquarters is said to be a clone, but it has never appeared since." Moreover, if the Lord of Ju Babies has a clone, why didn't he appear in several battles before. If they do, they will lose very little. Besides, there is no need for Longhe to fight with us like this, it is not in their interest. "

"Combined with this incident, there is a high probability that there is a very terrifying strong man or force that is targeting us. Maybe that person was not the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm before, but he just had some strange methods, and he was not sure to kill us, so he let us fight with the Dragon River again and again. But now, the other party has broken through and become the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and this is the beginning to deal with us!"

When they thought of this, they were a little frightened.

Because when the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors are killed, it will be their turn!

"Just stay at the Shadow Alliance headquarters, don't leave!"

The Lord of Shadows said.

"Good!"

They also thought the same way, if they went out now, it would be easy to be killed.

And after all, the headquarters of the Shadow Alliance is still a magic circle jointly arranged by many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and it can still resist a few attacks from the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and that Origin Upper Realm Overlord doesn't want to reveal his identity, so they have hope to live.

......

Soon.

One of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the Shadow Ruins had fallen, and there were not many Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors who survived, and after such a kill, only the three of them were left.

"Hiding in the headquarters of the Shadow League!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly, he naturally knew what the Lord of Shadow was thinking, but it was useless.

The Shadow Alliance Headquarters might be able to intercept an ordinary Origin Upper Realm Overlord a few times, but for him, that magic circle was no different from a paper paste.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled to the headquarters of the Shadow Alliance, his eyes passed through the layers of magic circles, and the magic circles here couldn't stop him in the slightest.

"Broken!"

As soon as Ye Tian pointed out, these magic circles were punctured like bubbles.

The next moment.

He entered the headquarters of the Shadow Alliance and came to the retreat of the Lord of Xuanyin.

This place is located in the depths of the void, and ordinary Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors can't enter at all, but in front of Ye Tian, it is nothing.

"Who?"

The Lord of Xuanyin sensed that someone had broken in, but before he could react, a terrifying force descended directly on him.

Boom!

In an instant, the body of the Lord of Xuanyin exploded, turning into countless fragments and dissipating between heaven and earth.

A Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor fell like this.

"Kill the other two!"

Ye Tian stepped out in one step, came to the Lord of Taihe, and killed the Lord of Taihe with a wave of his hand.

Immediately afterward, he came to the Lord of the Shadows.

At this time, the Lord of Shadow Vegetables already knew the situation, after all, Ye Tian broke into the headquarters of the Shadow Alliance, and the movement was not small, in order to kill the Lord of Taihe and the Lord of Xuanyin, it was also a little delayed, and he naturally had time to react.

But even if he reacted, there was nothing he could do, and there was no way to escape.

Airplanes!

The surrounding void condensed, and Ye Tian appeared in front of the Lord of Shadows.

"Spare your life!"

The Lord of the Shadows begs for mercy.

However.

Ye Tian didn't bother to pay attention to him, and bombarded him with one finger.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Shadow Alliance and disappeared.

After Ye Tian left, the other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors walked out tremblingly.

"The Lord of the Shadows, the Lord of the Taihe, and the Lord of Xuanyin have been killed!"

"I remember, the dead Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were all brought by the Lord of Shadow, and they were the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the previous Shadow Ruins. "

"It seems that it is the Lord of the Shadow that they have provoked, and we are almost affected!"

"It seems that in the future, don't just accept other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, in case the other party offends a powerful existence and angers us, it won't be good!"

And for a long time in the future, the film alliance will be extremely low-key, although it has not developed, but it has not declined.

......

Wind Tooth Island.

After Ye Tian destroyed the shadow ruins, his thoughts were clear, and he was in a very good mood.

In the following years, he worked hard to improve his cultivation, and his strength was increasing at a slow pace.

If nothing else, it will take him a long time before his strength skyrockets.

But on this day, an opportunity came.
